title: mentha longifolia subsp. mollis
intro: Mentha longifolia subsp. mollis, commonly known as horse mint, is a subspecies of the mint plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic qualities, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia subsp. mollis include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of horse mint, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
